title: The Marketing Meeting
summary: Michael Donovan, Jason Branham, Kevin Breen, Ziad Al Khatib, Matt Watson, Thomas Howe, and Joe Furnari discussed updates to the aesthetic sales deck, with Jason Branham having redone the 'V1 2025 sales deck v1'. Michael Donovan confirmed a review would be scheduled to align it with a modern aesthetic. High website traffic was noted, but concerns arose over a high bounce rate, low-quality leads, and an extremely high Cost Per Click (CPC) of $14-$15. Michael Donovan applied over 300 negative keywords and suggested reconsidering the 'better car people' strategy. A disagreement occurred between Michael Donovan and Vinnie Micciche regarding the priority of a strong lead magnet versus fixing website traffic analytics, with Vinnie emphasizing immediate website and analytics fixes, including a potential Google Tag Manager issue and updated AI messaging for Strollet PT. Michael Donovan advocated for a dual focus.

decisions.description: Schedule time to review and align the updated aesthetic sales deck.
Michael Donovan will build a template for the sales deck for others to utilize.
Applied over 300 negative keywords to Google Ads to block certain ads.
Achieve a bounce rate below 50% for the website.
Google Ads search terms were reviewed and optimized.
Develop a plan for a strong lead magnet to attract low-funnel traffic.
Prioritize fixing website traffic analytics and SEO.
Investigate and fix potential Google Tag Manager issues immediately.
Target email deployments between 12 PM and 2 PM for highest traffic.
Optimize landing pages for paid and social traffic as part of the new site.
Vinnie Micciche requested to review the restructured content before meeting.

actionItems.task: Build out the template for the sales deck for group utilization.
Coordinate time with Jason Branham to refine the updated aesthetic sales deck.
Finish updates on the Looker Studio report to consolidate all data sources.
Look into the direct traffic source issue for Google Analytics.
Double-check the Google Tag Manager setup for any tagging issues.
Provide Vinnie Micciche with the restructured website content for review.
Put together word tracks for the sales deck once it is assembled.
Send data and schedule time with Vinnie Micciche to review the 'better car people, PPC' strategy.
